zh.lifeSummary: 當William Rudhall於1460年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾洛--也時，他的父親John Rudhale28歲，母親Johanna Cowley25歲。他於1480年與Anne Milbourne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1530年3月22日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Rudhall于1460年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾洛--也时，他的父亲John Rudhale28岁，母亲Johanna Cowley25岁。他于1480年与Anne Milbourne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1530年3月22日在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rudhall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Rudhall was born in 1460, in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Rudhale, was 28 and his mother, Johanna Cowley, was 25. He married Anne Milbourne in 1480. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 22 March 1530, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Rudhall est né en 1460, à Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Rudhale, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Johanna Cowley, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne Milbourne en 1480. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1530, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Rudhall 1460 in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Rudhale 28 und seine Mutter Johanna Cowley 25. Er hat 1480 Anne Milbourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 22. März 1530 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Rudhall è nato il nel 1460 nel Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Rudhale, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Cowley, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anne Milbourne nel 1480. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1530, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Rudhallが1460年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアロス-オン-ウイで生まれた時，父John Rudhaleは28歳，母Johanna Cowleyは25歳であった。1480年にAnne Milbourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1530年3月22日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Rudhall(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 로스--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Rudhale(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Cowley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1480년 Anne Milbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1530년 3월 22일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Anne Milbourne em 1480. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1530, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Rudhall родился в 1460 г. в местности росс-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Rudhale было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Cowley, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Milbourne в 1480 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 22 марта 1530 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Rudhall nació en 1460, en Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Rudhale, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Johanna Cowley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anne Milbourne en 1480. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1530, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
